heading: Administrative
body:
| Commands                       | Shell Method                                  | Privilege Actions   |
| ------------------------------ | --------------------------------------------- | ------------------- |
| applyOps                       |                                               |                     |
| dropConnections                |                                               | dropConnections     |
| eval                           | db.eval()                                     |                     |
| fsync                          | db.fsyncLock()                                | fsync               |
| logRotate                      |                                               | logRotate           |
| setClusterParameter            |                                               |                     |
| setDefaultRWConcern            |                                               | setDefaultRWConcern |
| setFeatureCompatibilityVersion |                                               |                     |
| setParameter                   | db.setLogLevel()Others that use setParameter. | setParameter        |
| shutdown                       | db.shutdownServer()                           | shutdown            |
